1.name: Archway
1.description: An archway that you can pass through, primary texture.

3.name: Door
3.description: A door you can pass through.

5.name: SecretDoor
5.description: A secret door. Looks like a regular wall to normal vision, but works like a door.

8.name: LockedDoor
8.description: A locked door that requires a key to unlock it. When a locked door is unlocked, that status is saved with the character.

9.name: BoltedDoor
9.description: A door that is secured with a deadbolt or bar. When a bolted door is forced open, that status is saved with the character.

10.name: EnchantedDoor
10.description: A door that is secured with magic. When an enchantment on a door is broken, that status is saved with the character.

17.name: Archway2
17.decription: An archway that you can pass through, alternate texture.

19.name: Door2
19.description: A door you can pass through, alternate texture.

21.name: SecretDoor2
21.description: A secret door, alternate texture. Looks like a regular wall to normal vision, but works like a door.

24.name: LockedDoor2
24.description: A locked door that requires a key to unlock it, alternate texture. When a locked door is unlocked, that status is saved with the character.

25.name: BoltedDoor2
25.description: A door that is secured with a deadbolt or bar, alternate texture. When a bolted door is forced open, that status is saved with the character.

26.name: EnchantedDoor2
26.description: A door that is secured with magic, alternate texture. When an enchantment on a door is broken, that status is saved with the character.

29.name: Wall2
29.description: A typical solid wall, alternate texture.
